summary: Comprehensive testing of P1-P4 features for LEAMSS Portal. All features verified working: P1 (Sales/Commission reports with filters and export), P2 (Notification system with auto-read and history), P3 (Case Manager pending review and document search), P4 (Modern white sidebar UI for all dashboards).

admin_dashboard_p1_p2_p4.modern_white_sidebar: PASSED - White sidebar with LEAMSS branding
admin_dashboard_p1_p2_p4.sticky_header: PASSED - Sticky header with backdrop blur
admin_dashboard_p1_p2_p4.notification_auto_read: PASSED - Clicking notification marks as read (count decreased from 6 to 5)
admin_dashboard_p1_p2_p4.notification_history_page: PASSED - Shows all notifications with filters

case_manager_dashboard_p3_p4.modern_white_sidebar: PASSED - White sidebar with LEAMSS branding
case_manager_dashboard_p3_p4.pending_review_nav: PASSED - Nav button with count badge
case_manager_dashboard_p3_p4.documents_section: PASSED - Shows all documents with search and filters

partner_dashboard_p4.modern_white_sidebar: PASSED - White sidebar with LEAMSS branding
partner_dashboard_p4.user_profile_bottom: PASSED - User profile at bottom of sidebar
partner_dashboard_p4.sales_list: PASSED - Sales loading correctly after fix

features_verified: P1: Admin Sales Report - period filter (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly) works - VERIFIED
P1: Admin Commission Report - date filters work and show filtered results - VERIFIED
P1: Admin Commission Report - Export to CSV button works - VERIFIED
P1: Admin Commission Report - Export to PDF button works - VERIFIED
P2: Notification dropdown shows only unread notifications - VERIFIED
P2: Clicking a notification marks it as read and removes from dropdown - VERIFIED
P2: View All Notifications button navigates to /notifications page - VERIFIED
P2: Notification History page loads with all notifications and filters - VERIFIED
P3: Case Manager - Pending Review nav button with count badge - VERIFIED
P3: Case Manager - Pending Review section shows documents awaiting review - VERIFIED
P3: Case Manager - Documents section with search and filters - VERIFIED
P4: Admin Dashboard has modern white sidebar with LEAMSS branding - VERIFIED
P4: Case Manager Dashboard has modern white sidebar - VERIFIED
P4: Partner Dashboard has modern white sidebar - VERIFIED
P4: All dashboards have sticky header with backdrop blur - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reports.py correctly implements period filtering with get_date_range_from_period function
CSV export works via StreamingResponse with proper content-type headers
NotificationBell.jsx correctly shows only unread notifications in dropdown
Auto-read feature works by calling markAsRead when notification is clicked
NotificationHistory.jsx provides full notification history with search and filters
CaseManagerDashboard.jsx correctly loads pending review documents across all cases
All 3 dashboards (Admin, Case Manager, Partner) have consistent modern white sidebar design
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1-P4 features fully implemented and tested. All dashboards have modern white sidebar with LEAMSS branding. Sales/Commission reports have period filters (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly/custom) and CSV/PDF export. Notification system has auto-read feature and history page at /notifications. Case Manager has Pending Review section and document search. Fixed PartnerDashboard.jsx to use /sales instead of /sales/my-sales endpoint.
